strengths: Strong BI tooling (Power BI, Tableau, Advanced Excel)
Solid SQL and Python ETL experience
Time series and data modeling experience
weaknesses: No stated 5+ years in commercial analytics (experience ~2-3 yrs)
No direct FP&A or financial planning title
improvement_bullets: Developed time series forecasting models to predict customer acquisition trends, directly supporting revenue planning and identifying shifts in the sales funnel for Shine Masters.
Managed CRM data workflows via Salesforce to track lead conversion, pipeline progression, and backlog pacing, ensuring high-quality data input for executive-level reporting.
Partnered with cross-functional stakeholders to deliver financial performance analytics, translating complex data into actionable recommendations for budgeting and commercial resource allocation.
Built automated reporting suites for sales pipeline visibility, utilizing advanced Excel and BI tools to monitor key conversion metrics and improve forecasting accuracy.
Synthesized large-scale clinical and operational datasets into executive-ready dashboards, directly influencing business development strategy and performance-driven decision-making.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Commercial Analyst opportunity with Catalent. I am interested in this opportunity because of Catalent's reputation as a global leader in drug development and its commitment to accelerating life-saving therapies. What interests me about working for Catalent is its focus on high-impact, data-driven strategy within the Clinical Supply Services unit; the opportunity to influence global commercial operations through quantitative rigor truly inspires me. I believe my proficiency in building forecasting models and my expertise in sales funnel analytics would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by bridging the gap between raw technical data and business strategy. In fact, at Shine Masters, I implemented automated scheduling and KPI dashboards that replaced manual workflows, resulting in a 40% reduction in processing time and a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Commercial Analyst role at Catalent would allow me to bring my experience in time series modeling to optimize forecasting accuracy and pipeline management. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my CRM and stakeholder communication skills. I led initiatives to streamline client intake and CRM data integrity, ensuring that leadership had a reliable, unified view of commercial performance. This work directly supported data-driven decision-making, increasing team efficiency by 25%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in SQL and Power BI in working on the global Clinical Supply Services network at Catalent. I know that my analytical toolkit and commercial mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Commercial Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
